title: fix: suppress tool result JSON leak in text-delta stream during multi-step execution

relatedIssues.title: chatRoute: tool result JSON leaks into text-delta events during multi-step agent execution

summary: Addresses issue #13268 where some models (e.g. gpt-oss-120b via OpenRouter) echo previous tool-result JSON as text-delta content in intermediate agent steps during multi-step execution, causing raw JSON to appear in the chat UI. The PR originally contained production code changes to buffer and suppress leaked text in llm-execution-step.ts, output.ts, and transformers.ts, but the author reverted all production changes (commit d43c528: 'revert: undo text suppression implementation'). The current diff is test-only: 550+ lines of transformers.test.ts tests, 367 lines of stream.test.ts tests, and 166 lines of stream.e2e.test.ts tests that document the buggy behavior. Two changesets (core patch + ai-sdk patch) are included but no longer match actual code changes.
maintainerNotes: This PR is still a draft and currently contains NO production code changes — only tests and changesets. The author reverted the actual fix implementation and rewrote tests to describe current (buggy) behavior. The description still references changes to 3 production files (llm-execution-step.ts, output.ts, transformers.ts) that no longer exist in the diff. CI has 2 failures (Full Test Suite, Observability Package Tests) which may be flaky/unrelated. The changesets reference a patch version bump that doesn't correspond to any code change. The comprehensive test suite is valuable and well-structured, but the PR needs the actual fix re-implemented before it can be reviewed. No other PRs are actively working on #13268.
